Milkshake Mania Wiki
Play
Wiki / Goals

Goals

Goals are bite-sized objectives that refresh on a timer and pay out XP, cash, or temporary buffs. They give active play a steady drip of bonus rewards.

Two cadences

Daily & hourly

Daily goals

5 goals drawn from a larger pool, refreshing every 24 hours. Bigger targets, bigger rewards — blend dozens of shakes, earn a chunk of passive income, hire staff, buy upgrades, trigger events, or craft special blends.

Hourly goals

3 lighter goals refreshing every 60 minutes — small blend counts, a quick earn target, a single hire or upgrade, or a few special blends.

Details

How goals work

Seeded, not random-per-load

Goals are generated by a seeded RNG tied to the time window, so they stay stable until the window rolls over — reloading won't reshuffle them.

Rewards

Each goal pays XP, a cash sum, or a temporary income buff. Claim them as they complete.

Auto-claim

Turn on Auto-Claim Goals in Settings to collect completed goals automatically — handy for idle sessions.

No penalty

Unfinished goals simply roll over at the next reset — there's no downside to missing one.

ContractsTimed orders Power-upsTimed multipliers
